2603.26610.title: Think over Trajectories: Leveraging Video Generation to Reconstruct GPS Trajectories from Cellular Signaling
2603.26610.paper_summary: Mobile devices continuously interact with cellular base stations, generating massive volumes of signaling records that provide broad coverage for understanding human mobility. However, such records offer only coarse location cues (e.g., serving-cell identifiers) and therefore limit their direct use in applications that require high-precision GPS trajectories. This paper studies the Sig2GPS problem: reconstructing GPS trajectories from cellular signaling. Inspired by domain experts often lay the signaling trace on the map and sketch the corresponding GPS route, unlike conventional solutions that rely on complex multi-stage engineering pipelines or regress coordinates, Sig2GPS is reframed as an image-to-video generation task that directly operates in the map-visual domain: signaling traces are rendered on a map, and a video generation model is trained to draw a continuous GPS path. To support this paradigm, a paired signaling-to-trajectory video dataset is constructed to fine-tune an open-source video model, and a trajectory-aware reinforcement learning-based optimization method is introduced to improve generation fidelity via rewards. Experiments on large-scale real-world datasets show substantial improvements over strong engineered and learning-based baselines, while additional results on next GPS prediction indicate scalability and cross-city transferability. Overall, these results suggest that map-visual video generation provides a practical interface for trajectory data mining by enabling direct generation and refinement of continuous paths under map constraints.
2603.26610.paper_summary_zh: 行動裝置持續與蜂巢基站互動，產生大量的信號記錄，這些記錄為理解人類移動性提供了廣泛的覆蓋範圍。<lb/>然而，這些記錄僅提供粗略的位置提示（例如，服務小區識別碼），因此限制了它們在需要高精度 GPS 軌跡的應用中的直接使用。<lb/>本文研究了 Sig2GPS 問題：從蜂巢信號重建 GPS 軌跡。<lb/>受到領域專家的啟發，他們通常將信號痕跡放在地圖上並勾勒出相應的 GPS 路線，與依賴於複雜的多階段工程管道或回歸坐標的傳統解決方案不同，Sig2GPS 被重新定義為一項圖像到視頻生成任務，直接在地圖視覺域內操作：信號痕跡在地圖上渲染，並訓練一個視頻生成模型來繪製連續的 GPS 路徑。<lb/>為了支持這一範式，構建了一個配對的信號到軌跡視頻數據集，以微調一個開源視頻模型，並引入了一種基於增強學習的軌跡感知優化方法，通過獎勵來提高生成的真實性。<lb/>在大規模的真實世界數據集上的實驗顯示，與強大的工程和基於學習的基準相比，顯著改善，而在下一個 GPS 預測上的額外結果則表明了可擴展性和跨城市的可轉移性。<lb/>總體而言，這些結果表明，地圖視覺視頻生成為軌跡數據挖掘提供了一個實用的介面，通過在地圖約束下直接生成和精煉連續路徑。
2603.26610.author: Ruixing Zhang et.al.
2603.26610.authors: Ruixing Zhang, Hanzhang Jiang, Leilei Sun, Liangzhe Han, Jibin Wang, Weifeng Lv
